reviews.review_description:
Me and my friends paid for it and we got scammed you can’t even play the game. It’s keeps you at the first thing I don’t recommend it. 
￼
I hate this game it does not even have a mountain and you can't even join a lobby so yeah they shouldn't even have made that game and you can't even change your color.
In the second level i coldnt pick the sord up how am i soposto fight the scelitons. Bad game...

i think the idea of a vr peak game could be amazing but this is just not that i have some notes if the creator could use them 

1 first add multiplayer, that's the main thing that makes peak fun

2 add better items, i think an easy item to add would be the lollipop where it just gives you a giant boost of energy for like 10 seconds and then it goes away and you fall asleep

3 make the mountain not a bunch of blobs, it looks terrible

4 add some kind of lobby, like the airport from the regular game

 5 and lastly don't make extra content behind the pay wall just add cosmetics and stuff that's way better than hiding fun maybe put the cosmetics in the airport 

i understand that i'm asking a lot but this game could genuinely be really good and right now it's terrible the only reason i'm giving this five stars is because i want this game to get more views

I joined pick. I’m in the tutorial right then I don’t know where to go from there because they didn’t tell me where to go. I can’t even join a server because it just keeps disconnecting me from every server I try to join and how do I even go to the airport?
This cover is obviously ai and the gameplay is trash just get peak and install the vr mod!
So i skipped all the way to the totural and then i had nothing todo  so i just climbed the mountin but the mountin  Doesn't look like one? so un realistic
Me and my friend were playing but when we opened the menu it said cannot play multiplayer when offline but here’s the thing I was online pls fix btw first review and game is good keep working on it
u got this make ur dreams come true
Love it but i cant join public lobbys
This game has the potential to be good, but they HAVE TO ADD MULTIPLAYER and make physics better.
Friends want go play with friends
this game is not that bad, but there's so many p2w, and unrealistic physics
